finding: 4 of 5 spec relation families (Structural/Knowledge/Taxonomy/Namespace + a noisier Constraint) have clean single-token confident (s,r,o) factual-completion bases on Qwen2.5-3B -> they reduce to the SAME MEMIT edit operation as the Knowledge baseline; expression is therefore predicted (not separately run, to avoid a constructive tautology). The interesting axes are NOT family-expression: (1) cardinality->corruption is D1 within-family (continent card-4/currency~5 collapse vs capital), confound-free there; (2) Constraint adversarial FIRING is R15 (cooperative 24/24, adversarial ~half).
disposition: R3 cell COVERED by: this screening (clean bases) + D1 (cardinality-corruption within-family) + R15 (Constraint firing). Full cross-family corruption study NOT run = confounded (family one-to-one with cardinality) + redundant. NEXT real C2 leg = R13 (L1-storage vs L2-behavior split base-rate).
